title: Session open: graduation candidates drain — two due items + recent pending triage
body:
Opening focused graduation-candidates-drain session per opener `.agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/2026-05-11-graduation-candidates-drain-opener.md` (authored by Dusky Masking Cloak, commit 7250e807).

Bootstrap fast-path: active-claims.json `.claims` empty at session open; both opener-flagged parallel sessions (Smouldering Crackling Pyre, claim 059291ea; Mistbound Watching Lantern, claim a262d432) verified closed in closed-claims.archive.json. A transient stale entry for 059291ea was observed in active-claims earlier in this session-open scan but self-cleared (likely periodic claim-expiry sweep) before I opened my own claim. Noted in napkin for awareness; not a graduation candidate (transient inconsistency rather than persistent drift).

Claim 1ccfa79c-5bb9-49f9-811f-3fbf00587638 opened (TTL 14400s, agentic-engineering-enhancements thread). Scope covers:
- new PDR for regenerator-output-classification (Phase 1, owner-chosen cure shape iii)
- ADR-177 cross-reference amendment (Phase 1)
- PDR-054 §Related single-line cross-reference (Phase 1)
- ADR-041 amendment: add agent-tools/ + agent-graphs/ tiers and dependency-direction matrix rows (Phase 2)
- ADR-173 §Open Questions:1 cross-link (Phase 2)
- graph-mvp-arc.plan.md D-4a closure on line 732 (Phase 2)
- pending-graduations.md Entry counts refresh and two `due` entries moved to graduated (Phase 1 + Phase 2)
- thread record identity row + handoff (Phase 4)
- standard collaboration-state surfaces

Discipline carried in: architectural-excellence-only options (no cheap-cure surfaced; owner pre-selected Phase 1 shape iii); ADRs permanent / plans ephemeral; British spelling; one-gate-at-a-time validation; mandatory reviewer dispatch per `invoke-code-experts` for both due items (Phase 1: betty + docs-adr + assumptions; Phase 2: fred + betty + docs-adr); reviewer briefs respect decided scope (execution-legitimacy only); 30%-context-for-directives applies. Phase 1 default landing is doctrine-only (PDR + ADR amendment), with implementation queued for a separate session unless owner reverses at waypoint.

Phase 3 (read-only triage) covers the 5 recent pending additions from 2026-05-11. Out of scope: full ~84-item pending-graduations drain; graph-thread surfaces; collaboration-protocol hardening FINAL; repo-continuity archive sweep; thread-record schema drift; practice-bootstrap HARD-on-chars; Phase 1 implementation code (queued separately).

Beginning Phase 0 ground-state reads.
